questionHtml:
What is required for natural selection to occur?

I. Acquired characteristics

II. Advantageous characteristics

III. Genetic variation

A. I only

B. I and III only

C. II and III only

D. I, II and III

meta.title: What is required for natural selection to occur? I. Acquired characteristics II. Advantageous characteristics III. Genetic variation A. I only B. I and III only C. II and III only
breadcrumbLabels: D4.1.2. Roles of mutation and sexual reproduction in generating the variation on which natural selection acts
